rationale: Educ. Code §29.252 governs the agency's role in community education and fund administration. It has no relation to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
The agency shall:
(1) develop, implement, and regulate a comprehensive statewide program for community education services;
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text concerns community education administration and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
